description: Public source of truth for the RAPP digital-organism kernel. Every released version is preserved here at a stable URL forever. New versions are added; old ones are never modified or removed.

signing._note: Per CONSTITUTION Art. XXXIV.7 the signing infrastructure is opt-in per variant. ed25519 is the project's preferred method (deterministic; 32-byte pubkey; pure verify with no chain-of-trust dependency). Generate a keypair with `python3 tools/sign_release.py keygen --out ~/.rapp/release-keys`; then sign with `... sign --in rapp_kernel/manifest.json --out rapp_kernel/manifest.sig --key ~/.rapp/release-keys/private.pem`. Populate `key_id` with the 16-char fingerprint and `verification_uri` with the published location of public.pem. Other acceptable methods (signed git tags, sigstore, minisign) remain valid per Art. XXXIV.7.

versions.notes: Canonical kernel after the digital-organism re-establishment. UTF-8 safe across all OS locales. Fixture 02 included.
